identity.name: Ženy ženám
identity.mission: To create a safe, elegant, and optimistic digital sanctuary for the trans community.

rules: Do NOT use Inter for headings.
Use Playfair Display for all major headings to evoke elegance and humanity.
Use loose line-height for body text to improve readability in dark mode.
Never use pure black (#000000). Use Deep Slate (#0f172a).
Never use pure white text on dark backgrounds. Use Off-White (#f8fafc).
Trans colors (Pink/Blue) must be used as accents, not backgrounds for text.
Ensure all text meets WCAG AA contrast ratios.

general: Mobile-First: Always design for mobile grids first.
Bento Grids: Use asymmetric grids for dashboards and directories.
Generous Spacing: Use p-6, p-8, gap-6, gap-8.
Rounded Corners: Use rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl for a friendly, safe feel.

specific_pages.landing: Hero section with emotional 'orb' glow background. Large serif typography. Trust signals upfront.
specific_pages.service_exchange: Card-based grid. Clean hierarchy. Focus on the service offered.
specific_pages.doctor_directory: Split view: Map on one side (desktop) / Top (mobile), List on the other. Custom dark map styles.
specific_pages.legal: Clean, text-heavy but legible. clear categorization (Q&A vs Articles).

cards.style: bg-card border border-border/50 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-slate-900 hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full font-medium px-8
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary/10 text-secondary hover:bg-secondary/20 border border-secondary/20 rounded-full font-medium px-6

inputs.style: bg-slate-900/50 border-border focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary rounded-xl

navigation.rule: NEVER use transparent background without blur if content scrolls under it.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure at least 4.5:1 contrast ratio for normal text.
accessibility.focus: Visible focus rings on all interactive elements.
accessibility.aria: Use proper aria-labels for icon-only buttons.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute (kebab-case).

instructions_to_main_agent: Configure tailwind.config.js to use the custom font families.
Create a 'Layout' component that wraps the app with the dark theme provider and navigation.
Use 'framer-motion' for subtle page transitions (opacity/y-axis slide).
For the Map, use a dark-themed map style (Google Maps or Leaflet).
Implement the 'Service Exchange' using a Bento Grid layout for the listings.
For the 'Legal' section, differentiate Q&A and Articles visually (e.g., Q&A bubbles vs Article cards).
Ensure the 'News' section looks editorial (large images, clear typography).
